task_completion.description: A new rectangular room is attached to the rear of the house.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DreamPlan 2D or 3D view, a new room extension (approximately rectangular) is visible on the back wall of the Contemporary House.

task_completion.description: A door connects the sunroom to the main house interior.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A door is placed on the shared wall between the original house and the newly added sunroom, allowing interior access.

task_completion.description: Windows are installed on the exterior walls of the sunroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Windows are visible on the new exterior-facing walls of the sunroom addition.

task_completion.description: Wood flooring is applied to the sunroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The floor of the sunroom displays a wood grain texture or pattern (e.g., hardwood), distinct from the default plywood or empty ground.

task_completion.description: The sunroom is furnished with a table and at least two chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the sunroom, there is a table and a minimum of two chairs (or armchairs) placed as a sitting area.

task_completion.description: The required screenshots are exported and the project is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent uses the 'Save Screenshot' feature (or F8) to save 'sunroom_floorplan.jpg', 'sunroom_exterior.jpg', and 'sunroom_interior.jpg' to the Desktop, and uses 'Save As' to save the project as 'sunroom_design.dpn' in Documents.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan GUI to design the sunroom.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the DreamPlan interface (Building, Interior tabs) to draw walls, place doors/windows, and add furniture.

integrity.description: Exported images are genuine screenshots from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the built-in 'Save Screenshot' dialog in DreamPlan to generate the JPG files, rather than downloading images or using external tools.

integrity.description: The agent exported the correct views for each file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is in the 2D blueprint view when saving the floorplan, in a 3D exterior view when saving the exterior, and in a 3D interior view when saving the interior.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan supports exporting views as JPG via File > Save Screenshot (or F8 shortcut). The native project format is .DDP, but the Save As dialog accepts any user-typed filename, so saving as .dpn is valid and expected. Wood flooring options include 'Hardwood - Dark' and 'Hardwood - Light'. Tables are found under Interior > Furniture. Chairs/armchairs are under Interior > Furniture > Sofas and Couches. Doors are under Building > Doors, and Windows under Building > Windows.
